user.description: Set up the Azure OpenAI Conversation integration by providing your Azure OpenAI API key and resource endpoint. See the [Azure AI Foundry Responses API documentation]({instructions_url}) for details.

abort.entry_not_loaded: Cannot add things while the configuration is disabled.

data.max_tokens: Maximum tokens to return in response
data.store_responses: Store requests and responses in OpenAI

data_description.store_responses: If enabled, requests and responses are stored by OpenAI and visible in your OpenAI dashboard logs

data_description.chat_model: The name of your Azure OpenAI chat model *deployment* (not the base model name), e.g. `gpt-4.1-mini` or your custom deployment name.

data.inline_citations: Include links in web search results

data_description.code_interpreter: This tool, also known as the python tool to the model, allows it to run code to answer questions
data_description.image_model: The model to use when generating images
data_description.inline_citations: If disabled, additional prompt is added to ask the model to not include source citations
data_description.pro_mode: Perform more model work to improve reliability on difficult tasks and return a single final answer
data_description.reasoning_effort: How many reasoning tokens the model should generate before creating a response to the prompt
data_description.reasoning_summary: Controls the length and detail of reasoning summaries provided by the model
data_description.search_context_size: High level guidance for the amount of context window space to use for the search
data_description.service_tier: Controls the cost and response time
data_description.user_location: Refine search results based on geography
data_description.web_search: Allow the model to search the web for the latest information before generating a response

data_description.stt_endpoint: Your Azure AI Speech endpoint, e.g. `https://your-resource.cognitiveservices.azure.com/`.
data_description.stt_api_key: The API key for the Azure AI Speech resource.

data_description.tts_endpoint: Your Azure AI Speech endpoint, e.g. `https://your-resource.cognitiveservices.azure.com/`.
data_description.tts_api_key: The API key for the Azure AI Speech resource.
data_description.tts_voice: Neural voice short name, e.g. `de-DE-KatjaNeural`. See the Azure voice list.
data_description.tts_output_format: Audio output format returned by Azure Speech.
data_description.tts_style: Optional speaking style for voices that support it, e.g. `cheerful`.

generate_image_removed.message: The 'generate_image' action is no longer supported. Use the 'ai_task.generate_image' action with an AI Task entity backed by an Azure image deployment (for example 'gpt-image-2') instead.

generate_content_removed.message: The 'generate_content' action is no longer supported. Use the 'ai_task.generate_data' action with an AI Task entity instead.

organization_verification_required.description: Your organization must be verified to use this model. Please go to {platform_settings} and select Verify Organization. If you just verified, it can take up to 15 minutes for access to propagate.
organization_verification_required.title: Organization verification required
